senses.definition: someone whose job is to cut men’s hair or shave or trim their facial hair

examples.x: He visited the barber every month for a trim and a clean shave.
The barber used a straight razor to give his client a precise and close shave.
She trained as a barber and now runs her own barbershop downtown.
He decided to become a barber after realizing his passion for hairstyling.
The barber specializes in classic men's haircuts and beard grooming.

senses.definition: someone who cuts up and sells meat as a job

examples.x: The butcher carefully trimmed the beef to remove excess fat.
He apprenticed under a skilled butcher to learn the art of meat preparation.
She asked the butcher for advice on how to cook the perfect steak.
The butcher sharpened his knives daily to ensure precision and efficiency.
The local butcher sources his meat from nearby farms, ensuring freshness and quality.

senses.definition: someone who builds or repairs houses and buildings, often as a job

examples.x: The builder constructed a new housing development on the outskirts of town.
She hired a builder to renovate her kitchen and bathroom.
The team of builders worked through the summer to finish the school.
They consulted with a builder to design a custom home tailored to their needs.
She asked the builder to add an extra window in the living room.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to put out fires and save people or animals from dangerous situations

examples.x: The firefighter bravely entered the burning building to rescue trapped occupants.
She joined the fire department to fulfill her dream of becoming a firefighter.
The firefighter used a hose to douse the flames and prevent the fire from spreading.
He underwent rigorous training to become a certified firefighter.
The community honored the firefighters for their bravery and dedication during a wildfire.

senses.definition: someone who delivers letters, packages, etc. to people

examples.x: The mailman delivers letters and packages to our doorstep every morning.
Sarah's dog always barks loudly when the mailman comes to the door.
The mailman has been serving our neighborhood for over twenty years.
The mailman is responsible for sorting and delivering mail to each household on his route.
The children eagerly awaited the arrival of the mailman, hoping for letters or packages addressed to them.

senses.definition: a person whose job is to take care of plants in a garden

examples.x: The gardener planted a variety of flowers to create a colorful garden.
She hired a gardener to maintain her backyard and keep it looking neat.
The professional gardener specializes in landscape design and garden maintenance.
The gardener pruned the bushes and trimmed the hedges to keep them neat and tidy.
They consulted with a gardener to choose the right plants for their climate and soil type.

senses.definition: a person whose job is to protect and look after a person or place

examples.x: She hired a guard to watch over her estate while she was away on vacation.
The museum employs guards to protect valuable artifacts and artwork.
The guard escorted the VIP guests to their seats at the event.
They installed security cameras and hired guards to protect their warehouse from theft.

senses.definition: a person whose job is making clothes, especially for men

examples.x: My uncle is a skilled tailor who runs his own shop.
The tailor took my measurements for a new suit.
She apprenticed with a tailor to learn the trade.
The tailor specializes in bespoke suits for businessmen.
He visited the tailor to have his pants hemmed.

senses.definition: a person who is a member of a ship's crew

examples.x: The sailor's job involves handling ropes and rigging.
The sailor climbed up the mast to adjust the sails.
She signed up to be a sailor on a cruise ship for the summer.
The sailor swabbed the deck to keep it clean.
He learned navigation skills to become a skilled sailor.

senses.definition: someone whose hobby or job is taking photographs

examples.x: She's a talented photographer who specializes in wildlife photography.
The photographer captured stunning images of the sunset over the mountains.
He started his career as a photographer for a local newspaper.
The photographer uses both digital and film cameras in his work.
She hired a photographer to take family portraits for their holiday cards.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to take care of a child or children while their parents are away

examples.x: She hired a babysitter to watch her kids while she went out for dinner.
The babysitter read bedtime stories to the children before they went to sleep.
He started working as a babysitter during high school to earn extra money.
The babysitter prepared snacks for the kids and helped them with their homework.
The babysitter made sure the children brushed their teeth before bedtime.

senses.definition: someone who is employed to protect a famous or important person

examples.x: The celebrity's bodyguard always accompanies them to public events.
He hired a bodyguard to ensure his safety during his travels.
The bodyguard discreetly scanned the surroundings for potential threats.
She felt reassured having a bodyguard by her side in unfamiliar places.
The bodyguard underwent rigorous training in self-defense and combat techniques.

senses.definition: someone who is trained to travel and work in space

examples.x: She fulfilled her childhood dream of becoming an astronaut and traveled to the International Space Station.
The astronaut conducted experiments on microgravity effects during the space mission.
He underwent rigorous physical and mental training to qualify as an astronaut.
The astronaut gazed at Earth from the spacecraft's window, marveling at its beauty.
He wrote a memoir detailing his experiences as an astronaut, including his spacewalks and scientific research.

senses.definition: a company or person that represents another person or company or manages their affairs

examples.x: The agent facilitated the sale of the company's products to retailers.

senses.definition: a person who gathers and reports news or does interviews for a newspaper, TV, radio station, etc.

examples.x: The reporter interviewed witnesses at the scene of the accident.
She works as a political reporter covering events at the state capitol.
He's an investigative reporter who uncovers corruption and misconduct.
She started her career as a crime reporter, covering stories for the local newspaper.
The reporter attended the press conference to ask questions about the new policy.

senses.definition: a person who does the housework as a job

examples.x: The servant prepared breakfast and tidied up the house before the family woke up.
He hired a servant to help with gardening and landscaping around his estate.
In Victorian times, many wealthy families had servants to cook and clean for them.
The servant answered the door and welcomed guests into the home.
She worked as a live-in servant for a wealthy family in the city.

senses.definition: a married woman who does the housework such as cooking, cleaning, etc. and takes care of the children, and does not work outside the house

examples.x: Mary decided to become a housewife after the birth of her first child to focus on raising her family.
The housewife spent her days managing household chores, cooking meals, and caring for her children.
Many modern housewives also pursue hobbies or part-time work outside of their home responsibilities.
The housewife greeted her husband with a warm meal and a tidy home after his long day at work.
Being a housewife requires patience, organization, and dedication to maintaining a comfortable and harmonious home environment.

senses.definition: a person who works independently without having a long-term contract with companies

examples.x: The freelancer sets her own schedule and chooses which projects to take on.
She enjoys the flexibility of being a freelancer, choosing her own projects and schedule.
The freelancer negotiated contracts and rates independently, ensuring fair compensation for their work.
The freelancer completed several website design projects for small businesses.
The freelancer specializes in social media marketing and helps businesses increase their online presence.

senses.definition: the official in charge of a court who decides on legal matters

examples.x: The judge listened to both sides of the case before making a ruling.
She was appointed as a federal judge by the president.
He's known for being a fair and impartial judge in the courtroom.
The judge sentenced the defendant to five years in prison for their crimes.
She retired after serving as a judge for over thirty years.

senses.definition: the head of a company or corporation

examples.x: The president of the company announced a new expansion plan during the shareholders' meeting.
He was appointed as the president of the technology company after years of dedicated service.
The president oversees all departments within the corporation, ensuring efficiency and profitability.
He reports directly to the board of directors in his role as president.
The president's leadership style has been instrumental in the company's growth and success.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to give advice professionally on a particular subject

examples.x: She sought the advice of a financial adviser to help plan her retirement.
The academic adviser helped the students choose their classes for the upcoming semester.
He's a legal adviser specializing in contract law.
She hired a business adviser to assist with market analysis and business planning.
The career adviser provided guidance on job searching and resume writing.

senses.definition: a person who manages or is in charge of an activity, department, or organization

examples.x: She's the director of marketing at the company, responsible for advertising and promotions.
The director of the hospital oversees all medical and administrative operations.
He was appointed as the director of the research department due to his expertise in the field.
She's the director of the nonprofit organization, coordinating fundraising events and community outreach programs.
He serves as the director of the museum, curating exhibits and preserving artifacts.

senses.definition: someone whose job is to change written or spoken words from one language to another

examples.x: She works as a freelance translator, translating documents from English to Spanish.
The translator provided simultaneous interpretation during the conference.
He's a certified translator for legal documents and contracts.
The company hired a professional translator to localize their website for international markets.
She's studying to become a medical translator to assist with patient communication.

senses.definition: a man who participates in a sport professionally

examples.x: He's a dedicated sportsman who excels in both soccer and basketball.
The sportsman trained rigorously for the marathon, aiming for a personal best.
The sportsman represented his country in the Olympic Games.
The young sportsman dreams of becoming a professional athlete one day.
A good sportsman accepts both victory and defeat gracefully.

senses.definition: someone who is in charge of a newspaper agency, magazine, etc. and decides what should be published

examples.x: The editor reviewed the articles submitted by journalists before publication.
The magazine editor selects the cover story and feature articles for each issue.
She worked her way up from copy editor to become the editor of the lifestyle section.
The editor collaborated with writers and photographers to create compelling content.
He's known for his editorial expertise and sharp eye for detail as an editor.

senses.definition: a teacher who gives lessons privately to one student or a small group

examples.x: She hired a math tutor to help her daughter improve her grades.
The tutor helped the student prepare for the college entrance exams.
He works as a language tutor, teaching Spanish to beginners.
The tutor specializes in SAT preparation and test-taking strategies.
The tutor tailored the lessons to the student's learning style and pace.

senses.definition: someone whose job is selling or buying shares, goods, or currencies

examples.x: The trader monitors market trends and economic indicators to make informed decisions.
She started her career as a bond trader before transitioning to equity trading.
The trader specializes in commodities trading, focusing on oil and agricultural products.
The trader uses technical analysis and chart patterns to identify potential trading opportunities.

senses.definition: an expert who is employed to check or work with technical equipment or machines

examples.x: He's an automotive technician, specializing in diagnosing and repairing engine problems.
The technician installed the new software on all the company's computers.
He's a computer technician, providing technical support and troubleshooting for software and hardware issues.
The technician repaired the malfunctioning HVAC system in the building.
The technician calibrated the machinery to ensure accurate measurements.

senses.definition: a person who writes computer programs

examples.x: She's a skilled programmer who develops mobile applications for smartphones.
The programmer debugged the code to fix errors and improve performance.
He works as a game programmer, creating interactive experiences for gaming consoles.
The programmer collaborated with a team to develop a new software platform for the company.
He enjoys the creativity and problem-solving involved in being a programmer.

senses.definition: a person who works on a plane to bring passengers meals and take care of them

examples.x: She's been working as a flight attendant for ten years, enjoying the opportunity to travel.
The flight attendant demonstrated the use of safety equipment during the pre-flight briefing.
The flight attendant served refreshments and snacks during the flight.
He enjoys the variety and excitement of working as a flight attendant, meeting people from all over the world.
She underwent extensive training to become a flight attendant, learning emergency procedures and customer service skills.

senses.definition: a doctor who is trained to treat animals

examples.x: She's been working as a veterinarian at a local animal clinic for over twenty years.
The veterinarian examined the injured dog and administered appropriate treatment.
The veterinarian performed surgery on the cat to remove a tumor.
The veterinarian counseled the pet owner on proper nutrition and exercise for their dog.
He pursued advanced training in exotic animal medicine to become a zoo veterinarian.

senses.definition: someone who works in an office as someone's assistance, dealing with mail and phone calls, keeping records, making appointments, etc.

examples.x: She's the secretary for the CEO, managing his schedule and handling correspondence.
The secretary answered the phones and greeted visitors at the front desk.
He works as a legal secretary, drafting documents and organizing case files for attorneys.
The secretary typed up meeting minutes and distributed them to all attendees.
He relies on his secretary to prioritize tasks and keep his calendar up-to-date.

senses.definition: a scientist who studies chemistry

examples.x: As a chemist, he always wore safety goggles.
My brother works as a chemist in a big company.
The chemist explained the reaction to the students.
The chemist mixed two substances together.
The young chemist won a prize for her research.
